title: Workforms functionality needs enhancements
excerpt: We are a new Monday.com customer. We are heavy forms users.  We are finding that the Workforms functionality is very light especially compared to SmartSheet forms.  What needs to happen to have WorkForms offer more funct…

posts.author: mzona (Marisa Zona)
posts.cookedHtml: We are a new Monday.com customer. We are heavy forms users. We are finding that the Workforms functionality is very light especially compared to SmartSheet forms. What needs to happen to have WorkForms offer more functionality?

posts.author: Nachliel (Nachliel from Easyapps)
posts.cookedHtml:
Marisa Zona:

SmartSheet forms.

Hey, Nachliel form Easyapps the creators of the monday app Easyform here

What additional functionality are you looking for?
